---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for this project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: YOUSEF-ysfxjo
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature or enhancement you'd like to see.

## Problem / Motivation

Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe it here.
*Example: I'm always frustrated when...*

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

A clear description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request here.
